import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let haystack = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let needle = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  if string.contains(haystack, needle)
    println("YES")
  else
    println("NO")
  end
end
